name: amazon-ads
description: Reads Amazon Advertising profiles, Sponsored Products campaigns, ad groups, product ads, keywords, negative keywords, and portfolios via the Amazon Ads API using a Login with Amazon (LWA) refresh-token grant. Read-only.

risk.read: external Amazon Ads API read of profile, campaign, ad group, product ad, keyword, negative keyword, and portfolio data
risk.approval: none; read-only, no reverse-ETL write surface

conformance.reason: custom-auth-only (mode:custom AuthHook, no when-gated non-custom fallback); hook-covered, proven live by internal/connectors/hooks/amazon-ads's own unit tests (real httptest.Server driving the AuthHook's LWA refresh_token-grant exchange, Amazon-Advertising-API-ClientId/-Scope headers, and full read/pagination behavior) -- conformance's synthetic non-secret config has no real token_url and cannot exercise mode:custom auth at all (the hook would POST to the literal string "synthetic-conformance-value"), so every auth-resolving dynamic check would otherwise fail identically and uninformatively
